android.permission.INTERNET.description: Allows an application to create network sockets.

android.permission.READ_SMS.description: Allows the app to read SMS messages stored on your device or SIM card.

android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION.description: Allows the app to get your precise location using the Global Positioning System (GPS).

android.permission.CAMERA.description: Allows the app to take pictures and videos with the camera.

manifest_findings.title: Application Data can be Backed up
manifest_findings.description: The flag [android:allowBackup] should be set to false. By default it is set to true and allows anyone to backup your application data via adb.
manifest_findings.name: android:allowBackup

manifest_findings.title: Activity (com.example.sampleapp.MainActivity) is not Protected. An intent-filter exists.
manifest_findings.description: An Activity is found to be shared with other apps on the device therefore leaving it accessible to any other application on the device. The presence of intent-filter indicates that the Activity is explicitly exported.
manifest_findings.name: MainActivity

manifest_findings.title: Activity (com.example.sampleapp.DeepLinkActivity) contains an intent-filter and is exported.
manifest_findings.description: An Activity is exported and may handle deep links from untrusted sources.
manifest_findings.name: DeepLinkActivity

manifest_findings.title: Broadcast Receiver (com.example.sampleapp.BootReceiver) is Protected by a permission.
manifest_findings.description: A Broadcast Receiver listening for BOOT_COMPLETED is exported but protected by a system permission.
manifest_findings.name: BootReceiver

network_findings.description: Base config is configured to permit cleartext traffic to staging.example.com.
Debug overrides permits cleartext traffic to development/emulator endpoints.

metadata.description: The App logs information. Sensitive information should never be logged.

metadata.description: MD5 is a weak hash known to have hash collisions.
metadata.cwe: CWE-327: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm

metadata.description: Remote WebView debugging is enabled / JavascriptInterface exposed.
metadata.cwe: CWE-749: Exposed Dangerous Method or Function

metadata.description: App uses SQLite database and execute raw SQL query. Untrusted user input may lead to SQL Injection.

certificate_findings: Application signed with debuggable v1+v2 signing scheme
The app is signed using v1 and v2 signing schemes.
